task.summary: 2rounds search implemented with search() and fuzzy
"show" function implemented to show all clickable elements
new elements without name added for testing
function for get options of select
save option of select in array
custom select with numbers for each option
implement selecting options for native select element
scrolling for nested custom select container, search for selects optimized
test post request to server implemented
sending audio from nodejs to Bing ARS implemented
new selectors for date, time etc. inputs added
some code clean up, now only elem object used as parameter
functions to check if element is disabled or read only added
cutting string to maxLength attribute fo input
container for date/time implemented, issue with select fixed
test logic implemented for set date/time
set date/time logic with validation implemented
little bag in handleDateTime() with string

Merge branch 'feature/WSC-5-vocs-object' into feature/WSC-4-all-new-features-branche
# Conflicts: # .idea/workspace.xml # dist/bundle.js # dist/bundle.js.map # public/js/controller.js # views/index.ejs
keywords now can be used only isolated

Merge branch 'hotfix/WSC-9-code-optimization' into feature/WSC-4-all-new-features-branche
# Conflicts: # .idea/workspace.xml # public/js/element.js
'delete' for simple inputs implemented, also now with 'stop stop' 'stop' can be typed
new selector for inputs without type added

functions to check if element is disabled or read only added
cutting string to maxLength attribute fo input
container for date/time implemented, issue with select fixed

debugging und testing date/time
little bag in handleDateTime() with string
